title: pyrethrum alatavicum subsp. krylovianum
intro: Pyrethrum alatavicum subsp. krylovianum, also known as Krylov's pyrethrum, is a subspecies of the pyrethrum plant, a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Pyrethrum alatavicum subsp. krylovianum can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
